content: {"question": "What published cost-effectiveness analyses exist for intermittent fasting as a weight-management or glycemic-control intervention, and what incremental cost-effectiveness ratios (cost per QALY or per kg weight lost) have been reported comparing IF counseling to usual-care weight management, structured continuous energy restriction, or GLP-1 pharmacotherapy?", "search_queries": ["intermittent fasting cost effectiveness analysis QALY weight management", "time-restricted eating cost per QALY economic evaluation", "intermittent fasting vs GLP-1 semaglutide economic comparison", "preventive nutrition intervention cost effectiveness primary care", "obesity weight loss intervention ICER incremental cost effectiveness ratio Markov model"], "perspective": "Economic"}
